text: Offer paid Aimparency design partnerships as the non-dilutive fallback
description: Sell a tightly scoped paid pilot/sponsorship to 3-5 open-source teams or agent-heavy developer teams. Example ask: €5k for a 6-8 week design partnership including onboarding, roadmap influence, direct support, and a documented Git-native intent/dependency workflow; no bespoke feature promises that derail the product. Three €5k signed agreements meet the target. Validate willingness to pay and create investor evidence at the same time.

status.comment: Requires founder outreach, customer conversations, pricing approval, and signed agreements.
